name: Where no Life Dwells
description:
Before the creation of time, When nothingness was all, And a fiery star's
implosion, Caused the universe to fall.  Worlds in utter chaos and plague, Were
doomed to die at last, Vanished in the blackest void, A recreation of the past.
Before the creation of time, When emptyness was all, Utter darkness enlights
the way, To the surrounding walls, Journey through what mustn't be seen, To
where no life dwells.  From here no one shall live to tell.
